---
title: "About me"
type: html


---

Hello! My name is Alondra Casas and I'm an undergraduate senior at CSUMB studying marine science and minoring in data science. This is my final portfolio for STAT210 with Dr. Canner. I decided to take this class to fulfill my minor requirements but ended up really learning a lot and gaining valuable experience for my future. 

After graduation I am continuing my education at UC Santa Barbara gettibng my M.S. in Ecology, Evolution, and Biology studying the impacts of marine heatwaves on kelp forests.
